name: spec-coding
description: Spec-first workflows with intake clarification, branch implementation, and final acceptance for requirements-first features, design-first features, and bugfixes.

interface.shortDescription: Clarify, route, implement, and accept complex coding work through approved specs.
interface.longDescription: Spec Coding adds an intake-first clarification step, lightweight spec workflows, controlled branch implementation, and final task-based acceptance with review and adversarial review agents before reporting completion.
defaultPrompt: Clarify this request before writing the spec.
Create a spec before implementing this feature.
Plan this design-first change before coding.
Write a bugfix spec for this regression.
Run final acceptance for this completed spec workflow.
